name: Card
description: A flexible card container component for grouping related content with optional header, footer, and interactive capabilities.
usage_guidelines: Use to group related information and actions in a visually distinct container.
Add header for card titles and extra actions.
Use footer for actions or additional information.
Set clickable for interactive cards that navigate or trigger actions.
Use bordered or shadow variants based on your design system.

clickable.description: Makes the entire card clickable with cursor and selection styling.

header.type: {content?: string | ReactNode, className?: string, bordered?: boolean, extra?: string | ReactNode}
header.description: Card header configuration with content, styling, border, and extra actions.

bodyClass.description: Additional CSS classes for the card body.

footer.type: {content?: string | ReactNode, className?: string, bordered?: boolean}
footer.description: Card footer configuration with content, styling, and border.

bordered.description: Applies border styling. When false, uses shadow styling instead.

styling_info.visual_description: A rectangular container with rounded corners, either bordered or with shadow elevation. Header and footer sections are visually separated from the body. Clickable cards show hover effects and cursor changes.

Do: Use for grouping related content logically
Provide clear header titles when using headers
Use clickable only when the entire card is interactive
Keep card content focused and concise
Use consistent card styling across your application
Dont: Don't make cards clickable if only specific elements should be interactive
Don't overload cards with too much content
Don't forget to provide onClick when clickable is true
Don't define space css to the card, as its already come with 16px spacing for the body
